# Summary

<!-- What changed, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing behavior, config, or env vars.
- [ ] I checked that no credentials, auth files, or private prompts are included.
- [ ] I ran `bun run typecheck`.
- [ ] I ran `bun test`.

## Testing

<!-- Paste the commands you ran and the result. -->

```bash
bun run typecheck
bun test
```
